rationale: Already satisfied by prior commit 51dfa7c369460b6e356d26f5bb50e30f58a42530
("docs: record release target and readiness decision dispositions
[axon-86f6dba4]"), which is already an ancestor of this worktree's HEAD (and
of the bead's base-rev 4ad5bd49df47414408d81ce3ecbca60ef3bf0dcc). That commit
added docs/helix/06-iterate/DECISION-2026-07-06-release-and-readiness-dispositions.md
recording the release-target disposition (REVOKE 0.7.1, CONFIRM 0.4.x), the
audit retention/erasure disposition (DEFERRED), the tamper-evident audit
chain disposition (OUT OF SCOPE for V1), and the whole-consumer workload
deferrals disposition (NONE DEFERRED), all with Erik LaBianca
(operator/product owner) as decision owner, and propagated pointers into
prd.md, security-requirements.md, consumer-workload-gate.md, and
release-notes-0.7.1.md. No further code/doc changes are needed to satisfy
this bead's acceptance criteria.
